name: io.github.codespar/mcp-quickbooks
description: MCP server for QuickBooks Online (Intuit) — global ERP/accounting platform. Customers, invoices, payments, items, accounts, and P&L reports.

environmentVariables.name: QB_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks OAuth2 bearer access token. Expires in 1hr — caller is responsible for refresh via Intuit's OAuth2 auth_code flow.

environmentVariables.name: QB_REALM_ID
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks company id (realmId). Issued when a user authorizes your app against a specific company.

environmentVariables.name: QB_ENV
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks environment: 'sandbox' (default) or 'production'. Selects sandbox-quickbooks.api.intuit.com vs quickbooks.api.intuit.com.

environmentVariables.name: QB_MINOR_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: QuickBooks API minor version. Defaults to 70.
